hiredCandidates.name: Taylor Pike
hiredCandidates.summary: Maps claimed system behavior against actual execution paths and integration seams. Focuses on execution mismatches across ui, server, task pipeline.
strengths: Traces UI intent through backend execution paths
Identifies broken handoffs between surfaces and services
Produces concrete mismatch reports instead of vague observations
weaknesses: Less suited to greenfield product ideation
Can over-index on audit depth when rapid shipping is the priority
